calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

David Wasserman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff PARKMERCED OWNER LLC.
Witness Elizabeth Kershaw sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendants JOHN FAULK and MONICA CASTILLO.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendants as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at
750 Gonzalez Drive, 2-M, City and County of San Francisco, California 94132.

Damages $2670.00
Holdover damages $5340.00
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $450.00
For a Total Judgment of $8640.00

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff ParkMerced Owner LLC is present. Represented by Liz Kershaw.
Attorney Marina R. Franco for the plaintiff.
Defendants John Faulk and Monica Castillo are not present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendants. The trial date of October 30, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
